prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing
search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an
item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST
125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit.

=== PRODUCT CONTEXT ===
SKU: UPD-SPIRALNOTEBOOK-SPIDERMAN-HPNR
Product Type: BLANK_BOOK
Brand (from catalog): Innovative Designs
Existing Title: Spiderman "Movie " Spiral Notebook with Pen in Poly
Description: Encourage your kids to express themselves through writing and drawing. The Spiderman Notebook is a writing pad for kids where they can develop their skills in writing at an early age. Being able to write, allows kids to share their thoughts, tell their stories, and practice their creativity in storytelling. A great way for children to express their emotions and for adults to better understand the kid. Kids and adults who love Spiderman will be thrilled to write in the writing notebook with their favorite superhero character on the cover. Perfect pastime and learning activity for children to develop their skills in writing and storytelling. Parents can motivate their kids to practice handwriting. Makes a cute notebook to add to a kid's stationery collection and school supplies. Make your kids love writing by giving them a cool Spiderman notebook set school supply. Spiderman Spiral Notebook is designed to be your kid's go-to journal to express personal memories, writings and drawings. Cute gift, party favor, prizes, or souvenir in a nautical party. A must-have collectible notebook with pen for girls and boys who love to write and doodle. The Spider Man notebook is a cute journal made from premium quality materials, features a durable cover, 50 sheets of paper. The cover of the notebook features the famous character from the Marvel Cinematic Universe series: the Amazing Spider-Man. A handy, awesome, and small notebook as notepad, memo pad, and writing stationery designed perfectly for all ages to bring to school, work, and anywhere they go. Includes 1 Spiderman Spiral Notebook with 50 sheets blank white paper where kids, teens, and adults can write their notes for studies or work and 1 Blue Ball Pen. Features The Amazing Spiderman in comics version on the front cover. With the cute journal, kids will feel enjoy writing their stories. The Spiderman journal measures 6Lx5Wx0.5H inches.
Search Terms: kids school supplies girls notebooks spiral notebooks for kids notepads journals stocking stuffers back to school gifts diary car super hero spider-man marvel avengers comics stationary writing tool developmental learning reading penmanship
Features:
- SPIDERMAN NOTEBOOK – This officially licensed Marvel kids notebook features your favorite superhero - Spiderman!
- SPIRAL STYLE JOURNAL – This cool notebook features a spiral binding that will ensure your child can easily flip through the pages while journaling, practicing spelling or drawing. There are 50 sheets of paper inside of each notebook, and it comes with a ballpoint pen.
- COOL GRAPHIC DESIGN – The artwork on the front and back of the notepad has a cool stylized graphic design featuring Minnie and her cute kitten. Kids will love showing off their favorite characters at school.
- COMPACT SIZE NOTEPAD – Each notepad measures just 6” x 4.5”, making this a great size for little kids. It will easily fit inside just about any school backpack, messenger bag or lunch tote for on-the-go writing and creating.
- SPECIFICATIONS – Officially licensed Marvel Spiderman notebook with pen; Colors: Assorted; Dimensions: 6” x 4.5”; 50 sheets of paper; Safe for children ages 3 and up with adult supervision; Style of notebook: Spiral

=== ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) ===
Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title,
not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order:
  ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name}
- brand: use the catalog brand above.
- pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a
  dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent.
- size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS).
Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number.
Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing

=== TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) ===
Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most
search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a
repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable").
Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the
highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point.
Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep
acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out
"&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And
International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are
allowed.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name.

=== RETURN ===
Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape:
{"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Innovative Designs Spiderman Spiral Notebook with Pen

openai.item_name: Innovative Designs Spiderman Spiral Notebook with Pen

anthropic.title_differentiation: 50 Sheets Blank Paper, Includes Blue Ball Pen, 6X45 Inches, Marvel Licensed, Spiral Binding
